mxCell.value: Activity Diagram — Alur Utama SIMHPSB (Pembelian Gabah → Giling → Distribusi → Alert)
Terima Notifikasi Alert (via Push Notif / Dashboard)
Input Data Pembelian Gabah ke Sistem
Simpan Gabah di Gudang (Kapasitas maks 2.000 kg)
Input Data Hasil Giling (tonase gabah → beras)
Simpan Beras Siap Edar (Kapasitas maks 1.000 kg)
Validasi & Simpan Data Pembelian Gabah (FR-07, FR-08)
Hitung Konversi Otomatis estimasi_beras = tonase × 0.615 POST /api/panen (FR-04, FR-05)
Catat Distribusi & Update Stok Keluar POST /api/distribusi (FR-07, FR-18)
Update Dashboard Monitoring Real-time (FR-15, FR-16, FR-17)
Atur Konfigurasi Harga PUT /api/harga (FR-11 s.d. FR-14)
Pantau Dashboard (Stok vs Target 9.000 kg/bln Grafik tren, margin)
Kirim Order Beras (MBG: 155 kg/dapur/hari × 3 Toko: tidak rutin)
Buat Alert & Push Notif ke Admin (FR-19, FR-20) INSERT alert_log
Tanam & Rawat Padi/Jagung (Okt–Mar musim hujan / kemarau jagung) ~1 hektar, estimasi 3–4 ton/musim
Lihat Data Panen & Harga Beli (via Akun Petani Mitra)
Input Data Pembelian Gabah di Sistem (petani, jumlah kg, tanggal, harga)
Catat & Proses Distribusi Beras (stok keluar ke MBG/Toko)
Simpan Beras Siap Edar (kapasitas maks 1.000 kg)
Simpan Gabah di Gudang (kapasitas maks 2.000 kg)
Input Data Hasil Giling di Sistem (tonase gabah → konversi beras)
Validasi & Simpan Data Petani (FR-01, FR-02, FR-03)
Konversi Otomatis Gabah → Beras estimasi_beras = tonase × 0.615 POST /api/panen (FR-04, FR-05)
Catat Distribusi & Update Stok Keluar POST /api/distribusi Hitung HPP & Margin Otomatis GET /api/harga/hpp (FR-14, FR-25)
Buat Alert & Push Notifikasi INSERT alert_log (FR-19, FR-20)
Kirim Order Beras MBG: 155 kg/dapur/hari (× 3 dapur) Toko Rudi, Barokah: tidak rutin
Atur Konfigurasi Harga PUT /api/harga (FR-11 s.d. FR-14) Harga Beli / Giling / Jual
Pantau Dashboard Real-time Stok vs Target 9.000 kg/bln Grafik tren panen & margin (FR-15 s.d. FR-18)
Terima Notifikasi Alert Stok (via Dashboard / Push Notif)
Generate Laporan Periodik GET /api/laporan/panen|stok|margin Ekspor PDF / Excel (FR-23 s.d. FR-26)
nginx.conf — routes /api/* → Laravel FPM :9000 | SSL: Let's Encrypt
Laravel 10.x Container (PHP 8.2-FPM) — Internal Port: 9000 — REST API Only
AlertService — auto-check stok vs batas minimum
Tables: users, petani, lahan, panen stok_transaksi, stok_saldo konfigurasi_harga, alert_config alert_log, distribusi
Token Cache (JWT blacklist) Queue Jobs (Alert dispatch) Session Cache
HTML/CSS/JS — Blade or Vue.js Chrome | Firefox | Edge (terbaru)
VPS Hosting Ubuntu 22.04 LTS RAM 2GB | 2 Core | 20GB SSD
Sequence Diagram 2 — Transaksi Stok Keluar & Auto Alert | SIMHPSB
SELECT saldo_kg FROM stok_saldo WHERE komoditas IN ('gabah','beras')
Tampilkan saldo: Beras 450 kg / Gabah 800 kg
POST /api/stok { jenis:'keluar', komoditas:'beras', jumlah_kg:200, tujuan:'MBG Dapur 1,2,3', tanggal:'2025-04-14' }
SELECT saldo_kg FROM stok_saldo WHERE komoditas='beras'
INSERT INTO stok_transaksi (jenis, komoditas, jumlah, tujuan, petugas_id, tanggal)
UPDATE stok_saldo SET saldo_kg = 450-200 = 250 WHERE komoditas='beras'
COMMIT OK — saldo beras baru: 250 kg
[else — 422 Unprocessable: 'Stok beras tidak mencukupi (saldo: 450 kg, butuh: 600 kg)'] → transaksi DIBATALKAN
3. Cek Batas Minimum & Trigger Alert Otomatis
SELECT batas_minimum_kg FROM alert_config WHERE komoditas='beras'
INSERT INTO alert_log (komoditas, saldo_saat_alert:250, batas_minimum:200, status:'aktif')
FCM Push: 'Stok beras 250 kg mendekati batas minimum 200 kg'
201 Created { id:55, saldo_beras_kg:250, alert_triggered:true, pesan:'Stok mendekati batas minimum' }
Tampilkan konfirmasi & ikon warning stok rendah
Sequence Diagram 1 — Alur Login & Autentikasi JWT | SIMHPSB
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email=? AND is_active=1
Query data dashboard (stok, alert, panen terakhir, HPP)
200 OK { stok, alert_aktif, panen_terakhir, hpp_per_kg, margin }
→ 401 { message: 'Token Expired' } → Flutter redirect ke LoginScreen
Blacklist token di Redis → 200 OK { message: 'Logout berhasil' }
Hapus JWT dari Secure Storage → redirect LoginScreen
🖥️ VPS Server — Ubuntu 22.04 LTS RAM: 2GB | CPU: 2 Core | SSD: 20GB
Tables: users, petani, lahan, panen stok_transaksi, stok_saldo konfigurasi_harga, alert_config alert_log, distribusi
JWT Blacklist Cache Queue Jobs (Alert dispatch) Session & Response Cache
Docker Network: simhpsb_network (bridge) — semua container saling berkomunikasi via service name
Laravel 10.x — REST API Only (tidak render HTML Blade)
GitHub Repository kelompok4-simhpsb branches: main, develop /docs/ — SRS + notulensi
Let's Encrypt (Certbot) SSL/TLS Certificate Auto-renew 90 hari
MBG (3 Dapur) Toko Rudi, Toko Barokah (Pelanggan Tetap)
Chrome | Firefox | Edge (terbaru) Dashboard + Laporan + Alert
ERD — SIMHPSB (Sistem Informasi Monitoring Hasil Panen & Stok Beras)
Kelompok 4 | Rekayasa Sistem Informasi A1 — UKRI 2025
⚡ Update otomatis setiap POST /api/stok Maks: gabah 2.000 kg | beras 1.000 kg
Entity Relationship Diagram (ERD) — SIMHPSB | v2.0 | Kelompok 4
Trigger: auto insert saat saldo < batas_minimum
Seed: MBG D1/D2/D3, Toko Rudi, Toko Barokah
